CustomField.formula: IF( AND( Growth_Click_ID__c <>'', OR( ISPICKVAL(StageName ,'Closed Won'), ISPICKVAL(StageName ,'100%- Won'), ISPICKVAL(StageName ,'100%-Contract signed/Order received'), ISPICKVAL(StageName ,'Converted') ), OR(ISBLANK(SO_Amount__c), ISBLANK(Order_Number_SO__c)) ), "这是由Growth Click lead转化的业务机会，Closed Won时请填写 Order Number(SO #)和SO Amount。", "" )
CustomField.label: System Notification
